title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.125 - Refusal to submit to test, effect, penalties
text:
305.125.  Refusal to submit to test, effect, penalties. — If a person refuses upon the request of the officer to submit to a chemical test under section 577.041, then no test shall be given.  Any refusal to submit to a test shall be an infraction which may be punished by a fine of up to one thousand dollars.  The officer shall inform the person that his or her failure to submit to the test may result in a fine and administrative penalties by the Federal Aviation Administration.
(L. 1993 H.B. 562 § 10 subsec. 1, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 577.217; Effective 1-01-17
